---
title: "final_submission"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(knitr)
  library(broom)
  library(lubridate)
  library(stringr)
})

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "/home/rstudio/sta302-final-project")
```

```{r load-data}
stopifnot(file.exists("polymarket_all_meetings.csv"))
stopifnot(file.exists("fedwatch_long.csv"))

pm <- readr::read_csv("polymarket_all_meetings.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
fw <- readr::read_csv("fedwatch_long.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

kable(pm %>% summarise(rows = n(), cols = ncol(pm)))
kable(fw %>% summarise(rows = n(), cols = ncol(fw)))
```

```{r pipeline-functions, include=FALSE}
extract_low_high_bps <- function(x) {
  nums <- stringr::str_extract_all(x, "\\d+")[[1]]
  if (length(nums) < 2) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))
  c(as.numeric(nums[1]), as.numeric(nums[2]))
}

build_window_dataset <- function(pm_df,
                                 fw_mapped_df,
                                 out_csv = "final_analysis_dataset_window.csv") {

  stopifnot(is.data.frame(pm_df))
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(fw_mapped_df))
  stopifnot(all(c("meeting_file", "Date", "option_type", "p_fed") %in% names(fw_mapped_df)))

  # Polymarket window rows
  pm_win <- pm_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(window)) %>%
    mutate(
      timestamp = ymd_hms(timestamp, tz = "UTC"),
      Date = as.Date(Date),
      meeting_file = paste0(pm_meeting_key, "-probabilities.csv")
    ) %>%
    select(Date, timestamp, pm_meeting_key, meeting_file, option_type, p_poly, window)

  stopifnot(nrow(pm_win) >= 1000)

  # Meeting dates -> days_to_meeting
  meeting_dates <- tibble::tribble(
    ~pm_meeting_key, ~meeting_date,
    "sept2025",  as.Date("2025-09-17"),
    "oct2025",   as.Date("2025-10-29"),
    "dec2025",   as.Date("2025-12-17"),
    "jan2026",   as.Date("2026-01-28"),
    "march2026", as.Date("2026-03-18"),
    "april2026", as.Date("2026-04-29"),
    "june2026",  as.Date("2026-06-17")
  )

  pm_win <- pm_win %>%
    left_join(meeting_dates, by = "pm_meeting_key") %>%
    filter(!is.na(meeting_date)) %>%
    mutate(days_to_meeting = as.numeric(difftime(meeting_date, as.Date(timestamp), units = "days"))) %>%
    filter(days_to_meeting >= 0)

  # Lag predictors
  pm_win <- pm_win %>%
    arrange(pm_meeting_key, option_type, timestamp) %>%
    group_by(pm_meeting_key, option_type) %>%
    mutate(
      p_lag1  = lag(p_poly, 1),
      p_lag5  = lag(p_poly, 5),
      dp1     = p_poly - lag(p_poly, 1),
      dp5     = p_poly - lag(p_poly, 5),
      abs_dp1 = abs(dp1)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  # FedWatch snapshot per meeting/outcome (latest Date)
  fw_snap <- fw_mapped_df %>%
    mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%
    group_by(meeting_file, option_type) %>%
    slice_max(Date, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(meeting_file, option_type, p_fed, fw_date = Date)

  # Join + response
  df <- pm_win %>%
    left_join(fw_snap, by = c("meeting_file", "option_type")) %>%
    filter(!is.na(p_fed)) %>%
    mutate(
      error = p_poly - p_fed,
      abs_error = abs(error)
    )

  # Model-ready: drop rows missing predictors
  need_vars <- c("days_to_meeting", "p_lag1", "p_lag5", "dp1", "dp5", "abs_dp1")
  df_model <- df %>%
    filter(if_all(all_of(need_vars), ~ !is.na(.x))) %>%
    mutate(
      pm_meeting_key = factor(pm_meeting_key),
      option_type = factor(option_type)
    )

  stopifnot(nrow(df_model) >= 1000)

  readr::write_csv(df_model, out_csv)
  df_model
}
```

```{r data-cleaing}
# FedWatch required columns
stopifnot(all(c("Date","meeting_file","rate_bin","p_fed") %in% names(fw)))

# Parse + numeric probs
fw2 <- fw %>%
  mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    p_fed = as.numeric(p_fed)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Date), !is.na(p_fed))

# Rescale if any meeting uses 0-100 units
scale_tbl <- fw2 %>%
  group_by(meeting_file) %>%
  summarise(max_p = max(p_fed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(scale = if_else(max_p > 1.5, 100, 1))

fw2 <- fw2 %>%
  left_join(scale_tbl %>% select(meeting_file, scale), by = "meeting_file") %>%
  mutate(p_fed = p_fed / scale) %>%
  select(-scale)

# rate_bin -> midpoint rate
lh <- t(vapply(fw2$rate_bin, extract_low_high_bps, numeric(2)))
fw2$low_bps  <- lh[, 1]
fw2$high_bps <- lh[, 2]

fw2 <- fw2 %>%
  mutate(rate_mid = ((low_bps + high_bps) / 2) / 100) %>%
  filter(!is.na(rate_mid), is.finite(rate_mid))

# Meeting-level current target upper bound assumption
meeting_targets <- tibble::tribble(
  ~meeting_file,                 ~target_upper,
  "sept2025-probabilities.csv",   4.33,
  "oct2025-probabilities.csv",    4.33,
  "dec2025-probabilities.csv",    4.33,
  "jan2026-probabilities.csv",    4.33,
  "march2026-probabilities.csv",  4.33,
  "april2026-probabilities.csv",  4.33,
  "june2026-probabilities.csv",   4.33
)

# Map rate bins -> Polymarket buckets; aggregate to option_type probabilities per Date
fw_mapped <- fw2 %>%
  left_join(meeting_targets, by = "meeting_file") %>%
  filter(!is.na(target_upper)) %>%
  mutate(
    option_type = case_when(
      rate_mid <= target_upper - 0.50 ~ "cut_50plus",
      rate_mid <= target_upper - 0.25 ~ "cut_25",
      rate_mid <= target_upper        ~ "no_change",
      TRUE                            ~ "hike_25plus"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(meeting_file, Date, option_type) %>%
  summarise(p_fed = sum(p_fed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(p_fed = pmax(p_fed, 0)) %>%
  group_by(meeting_file, Date) %>%
  mutate(p_fed = p_fed / sum(p_fed)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Build final analysis dataset (and write it)
df <- build_window_dataset(pm_df = pm, fw_mapped_df = fw_mapped, out_csv = "final_analysis_dataset_window.csv")

stopifnot(file.exists("final_analysis_dataset_window.csv"))
stopifnot(nrow(df) >= 1000)

kable(head(df, 10))
kable(df %>% summarise(rows = n()))
```

```{r predictor-summary}
wanted <- c("days_to_meeting","p_lag1","p_lag5","dp1","dp5","abs_dp1")
stopifnot(all(wanted %in% names(df)))

df %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(wanted),
      list(
        mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd   = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        min  = ~min(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        p25  = ~quantile(.x, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
        med  = ~median(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        p75  = ~quantile(.x, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
        max  = ~max(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = c("variable","stat"),
    names_sep = "_(?=[^_]+$)"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = stat, values_from = value) %>%
  kable(digits = 4)
```

```{r response-summary}
df %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_error = mean(error),
    sd_error = sd(error),
    min_error = min(error),
    max_error = max(error),
    mean_abs_error = mean(abs_error),
    median_abs_error = median(abs_error)
  ) %>%
  kable(digits = 4)
```

```{r histograms}
binwidths <- c(
  days_to_meeting = 7,
  p_lag1          = 0.05,
  p_lag5          = 0.05,
  dp1             = 0.05,
  dp5             = 0.05,
  abs_dp1         = 0.005
)

for (v in names(binwidths)) {
  print(
    ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[v]])) +
      geom_histogram(binwidth = binwidths[[v]], boundary = 0) +
      labs(title = paste("Histogram:", v), x = v, y = "Count")
  )
}
```

```{r response-histogram, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ggplot(df, aes(x = error)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05) +
  labs(title = "Histogram: error = p_poly - p_fed", x = "Error", y = "Count")
```

```{r bar-charts}
for (v in c("option_type","pm_meeting_key")) {
  print(
    ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[v]])) +
      geom_bar() +
      labs(title = paste("Bar chart:", v), x = v, y = "Count") +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  )
}
```

```{r model-fit}
# dp5 omitted due to linear dependence with p_lag5 and p_poly
model_1 <- lm(
  error ~ days_to_meeting + p_lag1 + p_lag5 + dp1 + abs_dp1 + option_type + pm_meeting_key,
  data = df
)

summary(model_1)
```

```{r coef-table}
broom::tidy(model_1) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 6))) %>%
  kable()
```

```{r model-diagnostics, fig.width=8, fig.height=9}
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(model_1)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

```{r outputs-check}
files_needed <- c(
  "polymarket_all_meetings.csv",
  "fedwatch_long.csv",
  "final_analysis_dataset_window.csv"
)

data.frame(
  file = files_needed,
  exists = file.exists(files_needed),
  rows = sapply(files_needed, function(f) {
    if (!file.exists(f)) return(NA_integer_)
    nrow(readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE))
  })
) %>%
  kable()
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
